title: Quarry Mining Dimension
description:
A mining dimension for your modpack, that generates (virtually) all ores.

Could be used for building, quarrying, mining, or blowing things up.
body:
# Quarry Mining Dimension

### Adds a new dimension for you to quarry, mine, build, store, or even blow things up safely and with unlimited minable space.
![Mining Dimension Biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe433ae94ee5d3553575363338348bc4fd562cde.png)


### Easy to make portal
![Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12c38c69a245906b83d3e8cccfbad1059e6b3612.png)
![Igniter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9785a70522730c1679899718045ed287bed4fac6.png)
![Full Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2629ad4f4d3f753ace9c91438ccc824aaae6c3d.png)


**The Dimension has no water or lava, just the massive stony lands stretching into the horizon!**
